(a) If an insurer has certified a policy under Section 601.083 (Certificate of Motor Vehicle Liability Insurance) or 601.084 (Nonresident Certificate) , the policy may not be terminated before the sixth day after the date a notice of the termination is received by the department except as provided by Subsection (b).

(b) A policy that is obtained and certified terminates a previously certified policy on the effective date of the certification of a subsequent policy.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 601. Motor Vehicle Safety Responsibility Act
##### § 601.085 — Termination of Certified Policy

(a) If an insurer has certified a policy under Section 601.083 (Certificate of Motor Vehicle Liability Insurance) or 601.084 (Nonresident Certificate) , the policy may not be terminated before the sixth day after the date a notice of the termination is received by the department except as provided by Subsection (b).

(b) A policy that is obtained and certified terminates a previously certified policy on the effective date of the certification of a subsequent policy.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: If an insurer has certified a policy under Section 601.083 (Certificate of Motor Vehicle Liability Insurance) or 601.084 (Nonresident Certificate) , the policy may not be terminated before the sixth day after the date a notice of the termination is received by the department except as provided by Subsection (b).

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: A policy that is obtained and certified terminates a previously certified policy on the effective date of the certification of a subsequent policy.
